tagline: No artificial colours • Freshly cooked • Made with mumma's love
description: Mumma's Menu is a home-style cloud kitchen serving freshly made parathas, theplas, sabji, khichdi, farali specials and comfort-food Maggie. Order online and check out instantly on WhatsApp.

about.heading: From our kitchen to your home
paragraphs: Mumma's Menu is a home-style cloud kitchen serving freshly made parathas, theplas, sabjis, khichdi, farali specials and comfort-food Maggie — cooked daily with no artificial colours and a whole lot of love.

faq.question: How do I place an order on Mumma's Menu?
faq.answer: Browse the menu, add items to your cart, then tap Checkout on WhatsApp. Your order summary is pre-filled into a WhatsApp message so you just need to hit send.

faq.question: Does Mumma's Menu use artificial colours?
faq.answer: No. Every dish at Mumma's Menu is freshly cooked with no artificial colours, using home-style recipes.

faq.question: What are the most popular items on the menu?
faq.answer: Aloo Paratha, Paneer Butter Masala, and Cheese Tadka Maggie are among the most ordered items at Mumma's Menu.

faq.question: Do you have options for fasting (Farali) days?
faq.answer: Yes, our Farali section includes Sabudana Khichdi, Sabudana Wada and Farali Chutney, all suitable for Maharashtrian-style fasting.

faq.question: What payment methods are accepted?
faq.answer: Orders are placed and confirmed over WhatsApp, where payment details are shared directly by Mumma's Menu.
